ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inmates" (
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inmate */,
  "book_number" TEXT /* Booking number assigned to the inmate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the inmate */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the inmate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name and middle initial of the inmate */,
  "book_date" TEXT /* Date the inmate was booked */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date the inmate was arrested */,
  "arrest_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that arrested the inmate */,
  "id_number" INTEGER /* ID number assigned to the inmate */,
  "total_bond" INTEGER /* Total bond amount for the inmate */,
  "bondable" TEXT /* Bondable status of the inmate (Yes/No) */,
  "inmate_info" TEXT /* Detailed information about the inmate, including physical characteristics and booking details */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the inmate */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the inmate */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the inmate */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the inmate */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the inmate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the inmate */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the inmate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmates_arrest_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_agency_id") REFERENCES arrest_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "offense_type" TEXT /* Type of offense (e.g., Felony, Misdemeanor) */,
  "bond_amount" INTEGER /* Bond amount for the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmate_offenses" (
  "inmate_offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inmate-offense relationship */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date the offense was committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inmate_offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_offenses_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_offenses_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., booking officer, correctional officer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., booking, release, bond update) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_history_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmate_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release event */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the inmate was released */,
  "release_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the release (e.g., bail, parole) */,
  "parole_officer" TEXT /* Parole officer assigned to the inmate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_releases_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmate_medical_records" (
  "medical_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the inmate */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the medical record was recorded */,
  "medical_professional" TEXT /* Medical professional who recorded the information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_medical_records_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitations" (
  "visitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitation */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitations_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_calls" (
  "phone_call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone call */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "call_time" TEXT /* Time of the call */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_calls_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)
